cases.prompt: Release reviewed artifact sha-123 to production. CI passed; deploy with deployctl. The checkout smoke command is ./smoke-checkout. The previous artifact is sha-122 and /health must be green.
Stage reviewed commit abc123 with docker compose. It includes a data migration. Run docker compose ps for health, smoke-test /orders, and roll back to commit abc122 if needed.
Deploy reviewed commit 4f9a to production, but the Stripe production secret is unavailable. CI passed. We can smoke-test /checkout and revert to 4f8a.
CI is green on PR 81 but nobody has reviewed it. Deploy it to production now using ./deploy-prod, then curl /health. Roll back with ./rollback-prod.
The release of reviewed image app@sha256:123 to production passed CI but the /checkout smoke test failed. The rollback image is app@sha256:122; verify recovery with /health.
Correct the typo 'teh' to 'the' in README.md.
Add a unit test for parseDate that asserts 2026-01-01 parses as UTC midnight.
Change approved button padding in src/Button.css from 8px to 12px and run the component test.
Update lodash from 4.17.20 to 4.17.21 and run npm test.
Summarize issue 42 and identify the smallest reproducible failing test; do not deploy anything.
